creator: junovitch@freebsd.org
text:
x11-wm/xfce4 is building on all architectures:
http://portsmon.FreeBSD.org/portoverview.py?category=x11-wm&portname=xfce4

This was a transient issue caused by another port which was later fixed.  Fix title to make more sense and make overcome by events as the other fixes restored the package.
